title:
AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE DAO EMERGENCY HOSPITAL IN THE
MUNICIPALITY OF DAO, PROVINCE OF ANTIQUE, TO TOBIAS FORNIER
MEMORIAL HOSPITAL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 15220 / 65 OG No. 24, 6105 (June 16, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5333, June 15, 1968 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE DAO EMERGENCY HOSPITAL IN THE

MUNICIPALITY OF DAO, PROVINCE OF ANTIQUE, TO TOBIAS FORNIER

MEMORIAL HOSPITAL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives the Philippines in

Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Dao Emergency Hospital in the Municipality of Dao, Province of Antique, is changed and hereafter to be known as the Tobias Fornier Memorial Hospital.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 15, 1968.
